raw_requirements.text: The supplier shall hold a valid ISO 9001 certification at the time of tender submission.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: Bidders shall hold a valid ISO 9001 certification at the point of submission. Failure to evidence this will result in the bid being rejected.

raw_requirements.text: Suppliers must hold a current ISO 9001 certificate at the point of bid submission.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: Suppliers must hold a current ISO 9001 certificate at the point of bid submission.
raw_requirements.extractor_notes: duplicate of c003 from overlapping chunk boundary — reconcile should merge

raw_requirements.text: The supplier must hold employer's liability insurance of at least £5,000,000.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: The supplier must hold employer's liability insurance of at least £5,000,000.

raw_requirements.text: The supplier should provide a dedicated account manager for the contract term.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: The supplier should provide a dedicated account manager for the duration of the contract term.

raw_requirements.text: The supplier must demonstrate an annual turnover of at least £2,000,000.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: minimum annual turnover of £2,000,000 over each of the last two financial years
raw_requirements.extractor_notes: low confidence — extracted from a noisy financial table

raw_requirements.text: The supplier shall provide three case studies of comparable public-sector contracts.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: Bidders shall provide three case studies of comparable public-sector contracts delivered in the last five years.
